title: GETTING STARTED — cronjob
text:
Create a cron job
kubectl create cronjob my-job
--image
=busybox
--schedule
=
"*/1 * * * *"
Create a cron job with a command
kubectl create cronjob my-job
--image
=busybox
--schedule
=
"*/1 * * * *"
-- date
Create a cron job with the specified name.

$ kubectl create cronjob NAME --image=image --schedule='0/5 * * * ?' -- [COMMAND] [args...]
